project.title: Creative Toggle
project.description: Switch betwenn Creative and your last gamemode with F3 + X.
project.body:
# English  ![USA Flag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3747400f5a81e58173d6d35b134aa5663530d64b.png)

# Creative Toggle – Fabric Mod

**Minecraft 1.21.0 + | Fabric**

## What does the mod do?

Press **F3 + X** (default) to switch to **Creative Mode** - just like `F3+N` switches to Spectator Mode.
Press **F3 + X** again to return to your **previous game mode**.

> Only works if the player has permission to use `/gamemode` (Singleplayer or OP on a server).

## Configuration

The key can be changed in the **Settings** under the **Creative Toggle** category:

* Via **Mod Menu** → Gear icon next to **Creative Toggle**
* Or directly in-game through the settings-key-screen

### Manually (config file)

`config/f3toggle.json`:

```json
{
  "toggleKeyCode": 88
}
```

GLFW key codes: X = 88, Z = 90, C = 67, V = 86, etc.

## Compatibility

| Version |  Compatible |
|-|-|
| 1.20.6 | ❌️ |
| 1.21 | ✅️ |
| 26.1 | ✅️ |
| 26.2 | ✅️ |


The mod uses only stable Fabric API and Vanilla APIs, with no version-specific hacks.

## Languages

|  Version | English | Portuguese | Russian | Frensh | German | English Accent | Portuguese Accent | Russian Accent | Frensh  Accent| German Accent | 
|  -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | 
|  1.0.0 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌| ❌| ❌| ❌| ❌| 
|  1.1.0 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | 

***

# Deutsch  ![German Flag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61b5469b323c5dd4a2284693cd9b8031c1f75ee9.png)


# Creative Toggle – Fabric Mod

**Minecraft 1.21.0 + | Fabric**

## Was macht die Mod?

Drücke **F3 + X** (Standard), um in den **Kreativmodus** zu wechseln – genau wie `F3+N` in den Spectator-Modus schaltet.  
Drücke **F3 + X** nochmal, um in deinen **vorherigen Spielmodus** zurückzukehren.

> Funktioniert nur, wenn der Spieler die `/gamemode`-Berechtigung hat (Singleplayer oder OP auf Servern).

## Einstellungen

Die Taste kann in den **Einstellungen** unter dem Reiter **Creative Toggle** geändert werden:

- Über **Mod Menu** → Zahnrad-Symbol neben „Creative Toggle"
- Oder direkt im Spiel über den Einstellung-Steuerung-Bildschirm

### Manuell (config-Datei)
`config/f3toggle.json`:
```json
{
  "toggleKeyCode": 88
}
```
GLFW-Key-Codes: X = 88, Z = 90, C = 67, V = 86, usw.

## Kompatibilität

| Version | Kompatibel |
|-|-|
| 1.20.6 | ❌️ |
| 1.21 | ✅️ |
| 26.1 | ✅️ |
| 26.2 | ✅️ |

Die Mod nutzt ausschließlich stabile Fabric-API und Vanilla-APIs, keine versionsspezifischen Hacks.

## Sprachen

|  Version | Englisch | Portugiesich | Russisch | Französich | Deutsch | Englische Akzente | Portugiesiche Akzente | Russische Akzente | Französiche  Akzente | Deutsche Akzente | 
|  -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | 
|  1.0.0 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌| ❌| ❌| ❌| ❌| 
|  1.1.0 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- | --| 
| 1.0.0 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅|

project.title: Emeralds Plus
project.description: A Mod which adds a ton of new features for emeralds.
project.body:
# 💚 The Emeralds Plus Mod Upgrade your Minecraft experience with powerful new emerald equipment! The **Emeralds Plus Mod** introduces a complete set of **Emerald Armor**, **Emerald Tools**, and the **Emerald Upgrade** smithing template. Emerald equipment is balanced to be **stronger than Diamond** but **slightly weaker than Netherite**, making it the perfect mid-to-late-game gear. > ✨ Exclusive enchantments for Emerald equipment are planned for a future update! --- # ✨ Features - 💚 Emerald Armor Set - ⚔️ Emerald Tool Set - 🔨 Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template - 🏘️ Village Loot Integration - ⚖️ Balanced progression between Diamond and Netherite --- ## 🗺️ Languages | Version | English | Portuguese | Russian | Frensh | German | |------|-------------|------|------|-------------|------| | 0.9.1 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | 0.9.0 | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | --- ## 🔧 Channging the Mod Texture - If you want to change the textures just download the [Default Texture pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/emeraldsplusdefaulttexturepack) and change there textures.I recomment to use the same mod version as the texture pack. --- # 🔨 Emerald Upgrade The **Emerald Upgrade** allows you to upgrade **Diamond Tools** and **Diamond Armor** into their Emerald variants. ### Requirements - Diamond Tool or Armor - 1 Emerald Block - 1 Emerald Upgrade ### How to obtain - 📦 Found in **Weaponsmith** village chests - 🎲 **50% chance** to generate You can also duplicate the Emerald Upgrade:
📖 Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Upgrade Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bacf91da6fda64b30fc0cbb042602cda32169a2e.png) ![Emerald Upgrade Crafting 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d497761f2b7e4374a9f48bf530f99af507a4c9f4.png)
--- # ⚔️ Emerald Sword A stronger alternative to the Diamond Sword while remaining slightly weaker than Netherite. ### Obtain - 🏘️ Found in Weaponsmith village chests - 🎲 3% chance
📖 Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Sword Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5195e6bf78096101476463b038c242afeec73ba.png)
--- # 🪓 Emerald Axe A powerful axe balanced between Diamond and Netherite. ### Obtain - 🏘️ Found in Weaponsmith village chests - 🎲 3% chance
📖 Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Axe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fa006337e2199f537648be1be878476d15e37a2.png)
--- # ⛏️ Emerald Pickaxe Mine faster with an upgraded pickaxe stronger than Diamond. ### Obtain - 🏘️ Found in Weaponsmith village chests - 🎲 3% chance
📖 Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Pickaxe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cca38e87d57787c799bf8140b8086929a23ad0c2.png)
--- # 🛠 Emerald Shovel The Emerald Shovel offers improved durability and mining speed.
📖 Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Shovel Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4279e83dc2fa8163caeda97f42297893420824d.png)
--- # 🌾 Emerald Hoe A durable farming tool made from emeralds.
📖 Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Hoe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fc1d76e0efff0f40c176b18b2140f05c3825b52.png)
--- # 🛡️ Emerald Armor The complete Emerald Armor set provides protection between Diamond and Netherite.
📖 Armor Crafting Recipes ### Helmet ![Emerald Helmet Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/030f16155948131e3d1a1886c170db3960bbdc94.png) ### Chestplate ![Emerald Chestplate Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d8ae5377ddecc5883f6ecf3d93e7eb0d33776b0.png) ### Leggings ![Emerald Leggings Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101f6aba3b2765a6eec103009060c075c96784b7.png) ### Boots ![Emerald Boots Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca8d45393eec995b699b84324804a721a5b4cb3.png)
--- # 🚀 Changelog and Roadmap | Features | 0.9.0 | 0.9.1 | 0.9.2 | 1.0.0 | 2.0.0 | 2.1.0 | |-----------------|-|-|-|-|-|-| | Emerald Upgrade | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Armor | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Sword | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Axe | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Pickaxe | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Shovel | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Hoe | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | English Support | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | German Support | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Frensh Support | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Russian Support | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Portuguese Support | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Better Creative Tab | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Shield | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Exclusive Emerald Entchantments | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Spear | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |

github_readme.content:
# 💚 The Emeralds Plus Mod Upgrade your Minecraft experience with powerful new emerald equipment! The **Emeralds Plus Mod** introduces a complete set of **Emerald Armor**, **Emerald Tools**, and the **Emerald Upgrade** smithing template. Emerald equipment is balanced to be **stronger than Diamond** but **slightly weaker than Netherite**, making it the perfect mid-to-late-game gear. > ✨ Exclusive enchantments for Emerald equipment are planned for a future update! --- # 🔧 Building the Mod on his own - If You want to build the mod and change it for yourselfes use. You have to change the `mcreator` folder to the `.mcreator` folder .And it **Only works with Mcreator 2026.2 and the Fabric 26.1.2 Plugin** - If you only want to change the textures just download the default texture pack ( is also shown in the download ) and change there textures.I recomment to use the same mod version as the texture pack --- # ✨ Features - 💚 Emerald Armor Set - ⚔️ Emerald Tool Set - 🔨 Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template - 🏘️ Village Loot Integration - ⚖️ Balanced progression between Diamond and Netherite --- ## 🗺️ Languages | Version | English | Portuguese | Russian | Frensh | German | |------|-------------|------|------|-------------|------| | 0.9.1 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | 0.9.0 | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | --- # 🔨 Emerald Upgrade The **Emerald Upgrade** allows you to upgrade **Diamond Tools** and **Diamond Armor** into their Emerald variants. ### Requirements - Diamond Tool or Armor - 1 Emerald Block - 1 Emerald Upgrade ### How to obtain - 📦 Found in **Weaponsmith** village chests - 🎲 **50% chance** to generate You can also duplicate the Emerald Upgrade:
📖 Emerald Upgrade Crafting ![Emerald Upgrade Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bacf91da6fda64b30fc0cbb042602cda32169a2e.png) ![Emerald Upgrade Crafting 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d497761f2b7e4374a9f48bf530f99af507a4c9f4.png)
--- # ⚔️ Emerald Sword A stronger alternative to the Diamond Sword while remaining slightly weaker than Netherite. ### Obtain - 🏘️ Found in Weaponsmith village chests - 🎲 3% chance
Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Sword Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5195e6bf78096101476463b038c242afeec73ba.png)
--- # 🪓 Emerald Axe A powerful axe balanced between Diamond and Netherite. ### Obtain - 🏘️ Found in Weaponsmith village chests - 🎲 3% chance
📖 Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Axe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fa006337e2199f537648be1be878476d15e37a2.png)
--- # ⛏️ Emerald Pickaxe Mine faster with an upgraded pickaxe stronger than Diamond. ### Obtain - 🏘️ Found in Weaponsmith village chests - 🎲 3% chance
📖 Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Pickaxe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cca38e87d57787c799bf8140b8086929a23ad0c2.png)
--- # 🛠 Emerald Shovel The Emerald Shovel offers improved durability and mining speed.
📖 Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Shovel Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4279e83dc2fa8163caeda97f42297893420824d.png)
--- # 🌾 Emerald Hoe A durable farming tool made from emeralds.
📖 Crafting Recipe ![Emerald Hoe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fc1d76e0efff0f40c176b18b2140f05c3825b52.png)
--- # 🛡️ Emerald Armor The complete Emerald Armor set provides protection between Diamond and Netherite.
📖 Armor Crafting Recipes ### Helmet ![Emerald Helmet Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/030f16155948131e3d1a1886c170db3960bbdc94.png) ### Chestplate ![Emerald Chestplate Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d8ae5377ddecc5883f6ecf3d93e7eb0d33776b0.png) ### Leggings ![Emerald Leggings Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101f6aba3b2765a6eec103009060c075c96784b7.png) ### Boots ![Emerald Boots Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca8d45393eec995b699b84324804a721a5b4cb3.png)
--- # 🚀 Changelog and Roadmap | Features | 0.9.0 | 0.9.1 | 0.9.2 | 1.0.0 | 2.0.0 | 2.1.0 | |-----------------|-|-|-|-|-|-| | Emerald Upgrade | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Armor | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Sword | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Axe | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Pickaxe | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Shovel | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Hoe | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | English Support | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | German Support | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Frensh Support | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Russian Support | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Portuguese Support | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Better Creative Tab | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Shield | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | Exclusive Emerald Entchantments | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | | Emerald Spear | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | # License This project is licensed under the **Custom License by Mano Craft**. project.title: Creative Toggle Default Texture Pack
project.description: This Texturepack containes every texture of the Creative Toggle Mod
project.body:
# 🖼️ The Creative Toggle Mods default Texture Pack

The Creative Toggle Mods default Texture Pack lets you change the textures of the [Creative Toggle Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativetoogle).
You can use it if you want to change the mod textures.It Includes **Every** Texture and texture files of the mod version.Its neccesary to install the mod,otherwise the texture pack will do nothing

---

# 🚀 Changelog and Roadmap 

| Textures | 1.0.0 | 1.1.0 |
|------|-------------|------|
| Creative Toggle Mod Icon |  ✅  | ✅ |
| English Lang files | ✅ | ✅ |
| German Lang files | ✅ | ✅ |
| Frensh Lang files | ✅ | ✅ ||
| Russian Lang files | ✅ | ✅ |
| Portuguese Lang files | ✅ | ✅ |
| English Accent Lang files | ❌ | ✅ |
| German Accent Lang files | ❌ | ✅ |
| Frensh Accent Lang files | ❌ | ✅ ||
| Russian Accent Lang files | ❌ | ✅ |
| Portuguese Accent Lang files | ❌ | ✅ |


---

# Examples:

## The Key Change Screen

Here you can change the text and add new languages

![Key Change Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8EDtBDjA/images/353053803881fee6094373789c530c687a631f53.png)

## The Settings Key Change Method

Here you can change the text and add new languages

![Settings Key Change Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8EDtBDjA/images/b7327b5990e710be92c4ded1f704f431db84cc00.png)

value.name: Creative Toggle Default Texture Pack 1.0.0
value.changelog:
This is the first version of the default texturepack for the [Creative Toggle Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativetoogle)

## Added Textures :
- English Lang file
- German Lang file
- Frensh Lang file
- Portuguese Lang file
- Russian Lang file
# Its neccesary to install the mod,otherwise the texture pack will do nothing 
( I recommend to use the 1.0.0 mod file for this version )

github_readme.content:
# The Creative Toggle Mods default Texture Pack

The Creative Toggle Mods default Texture Pack lets you change the textures of the [Creative Toggle Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativetoggle).
You can use it if you want to change the mod textures. It includes every texture and texture file of the mod version.

It is necessary to install the mod, otherwise the texture pack will do nothing.

---

# Changelog and Roadmap

| Textures | 1.0.0 | 1.1.0 |
|---|---|---|
| English Lang file | yes | yes |
| German Lang file | yes | yes |
| French Lang file | yes | yes |
| Portuguese Lang file | yes | yes |
| Russian Lang file | yes | yes |
| Accent Lang files | no | yes |

---

# Examples

## The Key Change Screen

Here you can change the text and add new languages.

![Key Change Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8EDtBDjA/images/353053803881fee6094373789c530c687a631f53.png)

## The Settings Key Change Method

Here you can change the text and add new languages.

![Settings Key Change Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8EDtBDjA/images/b7327b5990e710be92c4ded1f704f431db84cc00.png)

You can use it if you want to change the mod textures.It Includes **Every** Texture and texture files of the mod version.Its neccesary to install the mod,otherwise the texture pack will do nothing

value.name: Emeralds Plus Default texture Pack 0.9.0
value.changelog:
This is the first version of the default texturepack for the [Emeralds Plus Mod](https://modrinth.com/mods/emeraldsplus)

## Added Textures :
- Emerald Sword
- Emerald Axe
- Emerald Pickaxe
- Emerald Shovel
- Emerald Hoe
- Emerald Armor
- Emeralds Plus Mod Icon
- Lang files for English

# Its neccesary to install the mod,otherwise the texture pack will do nothing 
( I recommend to use the 0.9.0 mod file for this version )

github_readme.content:
# The Emeralds Plus Mods default Texture Pack

The Emeralds Plus Mods default Texture Pack lets you change the textures of the [Emeralds Plus Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/emeraldsplus).
You can use it if you want to change the mod textures. It includes every texture and texture file of the mod version.

It is necessary to install the mod, otherwise the texture pack will do nothing.

---

# Changelog and Roadmap

| Textures | 0.9.0 | 0.9.1 | 0.9.2 | 1.0.0 | 2.0.0 | 2.1.0 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Emerald Upgrade Texture | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes |
| Emerald Armor Texture | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes |
| Emerald Sword Texture | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes |
| Emerald Axe Texture | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes |
| Emerald Pickaxe Texture | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes |
| Emerald Shovel Texture | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes |
| Emerald Hoe Texture | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes |
| Emeralds Plus Mod Icon | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes |
| English Lang files | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes |
| German/French/Russian/Portuguese Lang files | no | yes | yes | yes | yes | yes |
| Emerald Shield | no | no | no | yes | yes | yes |
| Emerald Enchantment Textures | no | no | no | no | yes | yes |
| Emerald Spear Texture | no | no | no | no | no | yes |

---

# Examples

## Emerald Upgrade Texture
